ranked_movies.title: Airplane!
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed and praised in the David Zucker AMA. Considered one of the greatest comedies ever made, with its rapid-fire jokes and iconic status.

ranked_movies.title: The Naked Gun
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned alongside Airplane! in the AMA. A cornerstone of Zucker's filmography and a classic spoof comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times in the horror-comedy and general comedy request threads. A beloved blend of zombie horror and British humor.

ranked_movies.title: Hot Fuzz
ranked_movies.reason: Often recommended alongside Shaun of the Dead. Praised for its action-comedy blend and Edgar Wright's signature style.

ranked_movies.title: Tucker and Dale vs Evil
ranked_movies.reason: Explicitly mentioned as the inspiration for the horror-comedy request. A modern cult classic that subverts horror tropes.

ranked_movies.title: What We Do in the Shadows
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in both the horror-comedy and general comedy threads. The film and TV series are highly praised for their mockumentary style.

ranked_movies.title: Cabin in the Woods
ranked_movies.reason: A top recommendation in the horror-comedy thread. Celebrated for its meta-commentary on the horror genre and clever writing.

ranked_movies.title: Blazing Saddles
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the general comedy suggestions. A Mel Brooks classic known for its satirical and boundary-pushing humor.

ranked_movies.title: Young Frankenstein
ranked_movies.reason: Another Mel Brooks classic frequently suggested. Loved for its parody of the Universal monster movies.

ranked_movies.title: This Is Spinal Tap
ranked_movies.reason: The top recommendation in the 'bad musicians' mockumentary thread. The definitive rock mockumentary.

ranked_movies.title: Rush Hour
ranked_movies.reason: Central to the discussion about the decline of interracial buddy comedies. A hugely successful and popular action-comedy franchise.

ranked_movies.title: Harold and Kumar Go to White Castle
ranked_movies.reason: The other key example in the interracial comedy discussion. A stoner comedy that achieved cult status.

ranked_movies.title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a peak 2007 Bollywood comedy in the extensive Bollywood post. A successful horror-comedy.

ranked_movies.title: The Blues Brothers
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times in the general comedy suggestions. A musical comedy with a legendary cast and iconic moments.

ranked_movies.title: Top Secret!
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed in the David Zucker AMA. Another Zucker spoof comedy, though mentioned less than Airplane! and Naked Gun.

ranked_movies.title: Superbad
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a movie that brought someone to tears from laughter. A defining teen comedy of its era.

ranked_movies.title: The Hangover
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a movie that brought someone to tears from laughter. A blockbuster comedy that spawned a franchise.

ranked_movies.title: Planes, Trains and Automobiles
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a tear-inducing comedy. A beloved John Hughes holiday classic.

ranked_movies.title: Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story
ranked_movies.reason: The example given in the request for movies about 'bad' musicians. A well-regarded music biopic parody.

ranked_movies.title: Extreme Job
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the Korean comedy thread. Noted as the second highest-grossing film in Korea and praised for its humor.
